title: Trade and Access to Credit in Import Destinations

summary.about: How access to finance in African markets affects exports from India.
summary.audience: Indian and African trade ministries, banks and trade-finance institutions.
summary.method: Estimates several gravity-model specifications with and without banking, credit, interest-rate and registry variables.
summary.insights: Better credit access allows even poorer African countries to import more, making trade finance central to India–Africa trade growth.
